016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.marshall.sse;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.AssertionUtils.*;
020import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.StringUtils.*;
021import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.Utils.*;
022
023import java.io.*;
024import java.util.*;
025import java.util.stream.*;
026
027import org.apache.juneau.marshall.serializer.*;
028import org.apache.juneau.marshall.stream.*;
029
030/**
031 * Session object that lives for the duration of a single use of {@link SseSerializer}.
032 *
033 * <h5 class='section'>Notes:</h5><ul>
034 *    <li class='warn'>This class is not thread safe and is typically discarded after one use.
035 * </ul>
036 *
037 * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
038 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/SseBasics">SSE Basics</a>
039 * </ul>
040 */
041@SuppressWarnings({
042   "java:S110", // Inheritance depth acceptable for session hierarchy
043   "java:S115", // Match AssertionUtils arg-name style used throughout Juneau.
044   "resource"   // Closeable resources are owned by the caller's serializer session; Eclipse JDT @Owning warning is by design.
045})
046public class SseSerializerSession extends WriterSerializerSession implements RecordWritable {
047
048   private static final String ARG_ctx = "ctx";
049
050   /**
051    * Builder class.
052    */
053   public static class Builder extends WriterSerializerSession.Builder<Builder> {
054
055      /**
056       * Constructor.
057       *
058       * @param ctx The context creating this session. Cannot be <jk>null</jk>.
059       */
060      protected Builder(SseSerializer ctx) {
061         super(assertArgNotNull(ARG_ctx, ctx));
062      }
063
064      @Override
065      public SseSerializerSession build() {
066         return new SseSerializerSession(this);
067      }
068   }
069
070   /**
071    * Creates a new builder for this object.
072    *
073    * @param ctx The context creating this session. Cannot be <jk>null</jk>.
074    * @return A new builder.
075    */
076   public static Builder create(SseSerializer ctx) {
077      return new Builder(assertArgNotNull(ARG_ctx, ctx));
078   }
079
080   /**
081    * Constructor.
082    *
083    * @param builder The builder for this object.
084    */
085   protected SseSerializerSession(Builder builder) {
086      super(builder);
087   }
088
089   @Override /* RecordWritable */
090   public RecordWriter serializeRecords(Object output) throws IOException {
091      return RecordAdapter.arrayWriter(this, output);
092   }
093
094   @Override /* RecordWritable */
095   public boolean isRecordStreaming() {
096      return false;
097   }
098
099   @Override /* Overridden from SerializerSession */
100   @SuppressWarnings({
101      "java:S2095" // Writer is owned by SerializerPipe/caller and must not be closed by this session.
102   })
103   protected void doSerialize(SerializerPipe pipe, Object o) throws IOException, SerializeException {
104      var w = pipe.getWriter();
105      if (o == null)
106         return;
107      if (o instanceof SseEvent e) {
108         writeEvent(w, e);
109      } else if (o instanceof Iterable<?> i) {
110         for (var item : i)
111            writeIfEvent(w, item);
112      } else if (o instanceof Stream<?> s) {
113         try (var s2 = s) {
114            s2.forEach(item -> writeIfEventUnchecked(w, item));
115         }
116      } else if (o instanceof SseEvent[] arr) {
117         for (var e : arr)
118            writeEvent(w, e);
119      } else if (o.getClass().isArray()) {
120         var arr = (Object[]) o;
121         for (var item : arr)
122            writeIfEvent(w, item);
123      } else {
124         throw new SerializeException("SseSerializer cannot serialize objects of type ''{0}''.", cn(o));
125      }
126   }
127
128   private static void writeIfEvent(Writer w, Object item) throws IOException, SerializeException {
129      if (item == null)
130         return;
131      if (!(item instanceof SseEvent e))
132         throw new SerializeException("SseSerializer encountered non-SseEvent element of type ''{0}''.", cn(item));
133      writeEvent(w, e);
134   }
135
136   private static void writeIfEventUnchecked(Writer w, Object item) {
137      try {
138         writeIfEvent(w, item);
139      } catch (IOException e) {
140         throw new UncheckedIOException(e);
141      } catch (SerializeException e) {
142         throw new IllegalArgumentException(e);
143      }
144   }
145
146   private static void writeEvent(Writer w, SseEvent e) throws IOException {
147      if (e == null)
148         return;
149      if (!isEmpty(e.getEvent()))
150         writeField(w, "event", e.getEvent());
151      if (e.getData() != null) {
152         for (var line : splitData(e.getData()))
153            writeField(w, "data", line);
154      }
155      if (e.getId() != null)
156         writeField(w, "id", e.getId());
157      if (e.getRetry() != null)
158         w.write("retry: " + e.getRetry() + "\n");
159      w.write("\n");
160      w.flush();
161   }
162
163   private static void writeField(Writer w, String name, String value) throws IOException {
164      w.write(name);
165      w.write(": ");
166      w.write(value);
167      w.write('\n');
168   }
169
170   static List<String> splitData(String s) {
171      var parts = s.split("\n", -1);
172      return Arrays.asList(parts);
173   }
174}
